boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: contractor onboarding with completed background and vendor-workforce mapping.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Dependencies not closed by source records
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Control record fails exact boundary closure
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: background clearance and vendor workforce ID both current

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact execution boundary. The control record says the required current dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped differently, and the boundary note says communication tone cannot authorize contractor activation. Because the current screening closure is unresolved, execution should not proceed; escalate for source-record closure.
open_blockers: background clearance and vendor workforce ID both current
